title: Lance Schuler-Legal
compiled_truth: Lance Schuler-Legal is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-09-29 to 2001-07-11), Lance Schuler-Legal sent 20 and received 363 emails, totalling 383 interactions.
